name: Druid
summary: Defender of the wilds. Divine spellcaster who can shapeshift, summon nature's wrath, and bond with an animal companion.

class_features.name: Nature Bond
class_features.summary: Choose either an animal companion (1st-level effective druid level) or a domain (cleric domain list, restricted to Air, Animal, Earth, Fire, Plant, Water, Weather).

class_features.name: Wild Empathy
class_features.summary: Roll 1d20 + class level + Cha to influence an animal's attitude.

class_features.name: Orisons
class_features.summary: Prepares 0-level druid spells; they are not expended when cast.
